summary: The actual screenshot depicts a full encyclopedia window with a left navigation list and right scrollable article body over a gameplay map background, aligning with the screen description. However, the wireframe shows a minimal placeholder window without the split layout, leading to significant mismatches in structure, content, and positioning. The wireframe is unsuitable for validating the requirements due to its incomplete representation.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Dark starfield/game-map background
correctElements.evidence: Both actual and wireframe feature a dark starfield background with map elements like stellar bodies and lines.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: thin green panel borders
correctElements.evidence: Panels in both images have thin green borders.

correctElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-ENCYCLOPEDIA-WINDOW: Visually satisfy documented screen description and UI behavior
correctElements.evidence: Top resource bars (POP, MET, FUEL) are present in similar positions and styles in both.

correctElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-ENCYCLOPEDIA-WINDOW: Gameplay map with Encyclopedia dockable window
correctElements.evidence: A 'Map Key' panel is visible in both, though positioned differently.

incorrectElements.requirement: Screen description: Window is a split layout with navigation list at left and scrollable article body at right
incorrectElements.expected: Split layout with left navigation list and right content area
incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe shows a small central window with placeholder text and buttons, no split layout; actual has full split layout
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe does not depict the required split layout, making it mismatched for comparison

incorrectElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-ENCYCLOPEDIA-WINDOW: Visually satisfy documented screen description
incorrectElements.expected: Left-side list with categories like 'Articles', 'Core Rules', 'Turn Flow'
incorrectElements.actual: Missing in wireframe; present in actual
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe lacks the navigation component entirely

incorrectElements.requirement: Screen description: scrollable article body at right
incorrectElements.expected: Scrollable body with article text, headings like 'Turn Flow', 'Key Points'
incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe has minimal placeholder 'bounded scroll content'; actual has detailed content
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe uses generic placeholder instead of representative content

incorrectElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: fixed screen-relative geometry
incorrectElements.expected: Large dockable window covering much of the screen with split layout
incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe shows small centered window; actual spans most of the screen
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Mismatch in bounds and positioning affects layout validation

incorrectElements.expected: Turn and phase indicators consistent with game state
incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe has 'Production Phase | Active: Cadet'; actual has 'Purchase Phase | Active:' with encyclopedia title
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Inconsistent phase and active player text, potentially confusing state representation

incorrectElements.expected: No prominent BACK/NEXT buttons in encyclopedia view
incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe includes BACK and NEXT/APPLY buttons; actual does not
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Extra controls in wireframe not present in actual or description, indicating wireframe mismatch

incorrectElements.requirement: Screen description: Gameplay map with Encyclopedia dockable window
incorrectElements.expected: Map elements partially visible behind window
incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe shows more prominent map with named stars (Sirius, Arcturus, Canopus); actual has subtle map elements
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Difference in map detail and visibility could affect occlusion and z-order validation

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframe does not accurately represent the described split layout for the encyclopedia window, using placeholders instead of specific elements, which prevents effective validation of the functional requirements. It appears to depict a different or incomplete screen state, missing key components like the navigation list and detailed content.
missingRequirements: Scrollable article body with sample content
Accurate window sizing and positioning relative to the map
recommendedWireframeChanges: Update to include split layout with left list and right content
Add representative text and headings to match screen description
Remove extraneous buttons like BACK/NEXT if not part of encyclopedia view
Ensure consistent top bar and resource indicators
